Our Services

Professional epoxy-flooring solutions for every need

Residential Garage Floors

Heavy-duty garage protection engineered for Minnesota's harsh winters.

Learn More →

Basement Floor Coatings

Moisture-resistant basement floors that combat Minnesota's high water tables.

Learn More →

Commercial Epoxy Systems

High-traffic floors for Twin Cities businesses that demand durability.

Learn More →

Decorative Metallic Epoxy

Luxury floors that elevate Minneapolis lofts and high-end homes.

Learn More →

Concrete Repair & Resurfacing

Structural solutions for frost-damaged Twin Cities concrete.

Learn More →

Anti-Slip Floor Systems

Safety flooring for Minnesota's icy entryways and pool decks.

Learn More →

Radiant Heat Compatible Floors

Epoxy systems optimized for Minnesota's popular heated floors.

Learn More →
Summit Epoxy Flooring

Trusted epoxy flooring professionals serving Minneapolis, MN and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
